hero.badge: Smart Operating Platform for Modern Stores
hero.title: Run your store. Track sales. Collect installments.
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to manage sales, inventory, installments, and your online store — in one unified platform that works from day one.

pillars.title: Four Pillars to Build Your Business On
pillars.subtitle: No need for scattered tools — sales, inventory, installments, and your storefront move together seamlessly.

sales.title: Faster Sales & Smarter Invoices
sales.summary: Create invoices in seconds, track every payment, and link sales to inventory and customers automatically — no Excel sheets needed.
bullets: Cash and installment invoices from one screen
Record partial and full payments instantly
Automatic syncing with inventory and customer records

inventory.title: Your Inventory, Always Under Control
inventory.summary: Know what's moving and what's running low before you lose a sale — with smart alerts and real-time updates.
bullets: Instant alerts for low stock levels
Manage images, prices, and details centrally
Smart organization by categories and sections

storefront.title: An Online Store Working 24/7
storefront.summary: A professional storefront that showcases your products and accepts orders — even while you sleep. Linked directly to your real inventory.
bullets: Clean product pages ready to share
Shopping cart and direct mobile ordering
Automatic syncing with inventory and shipping

installments.title: Clear Installments & Painless Collection
installments.summary: Track who paid, who's late, and when the next installment is due — everything is in front of you instead of scattered spreadsheets.
bullets: Flexible payment schedules linked to invoices
Clear collection metrics ready for export

workflow.title: From Signup to First Sale in 4 Steps

steps.title: Sign Up & Set Up
steps.text: One account is all you need. Add your store name, products, and categories — and start immediately.

steps.title: Start Selling Instantly
steps.text: Create invoices, record payments, and monitor sales from a single screen instead of multiple disjointed tools.

steps.title: Launch Your Online Store
steps.text: Showcase your products in a professional storefront that customers can easily access and order from.

steps.title: Track Growth & Decide Better
steps.text: Indicators and alerts tell you where sales are moving, what needs restocking, and who is late on payments.

paths.title: Choose the Path That Fits Your Needs
paths.subtitle: Whether you focus on sales, inventory, installments, or your online store — you'll find a starting point designed exactly for you.

finalCta.title: Your store deserves a smarter system.
finalCta.description: Join over 1,000 merchants managing their sales, inventory, and installments effortlessly with PayQusta. Try it yourself for free.

cta.title: Build a stronger digital presence and manage your operations from one place.
cta.description: The website introduces customers to your store, and the internal system automatically connects sales to inventory and billing.

trust.title: Trust & Policies
trust.description: Pages that help you understand our terms and privacy guidelines before you begin.

brand.title: About the Brand
brand.description: PayQusta is an integrated operational platform tailored for modern retail stores.

footer.tagline: Professional operating platform for stores — designed to work flawlessly on all devices.
